design_policy.purpose: interpret coactivation, overlap, conflict, and criteria 'not better explained' clauses

rules.label: Not better explained by another disorder for Ménière criteria audit
rules.rule: no competing disease posterior >= competing_explanation_threshold AND no safety-relevant competing disease posterior >= safety_threshold

rules.label: Not better explained by another disorder for BPPV criteria audit
rules.rule: no competing disease posterior >= competing_explanation_threshold AND no safety-relevant competing disease posterior >= safety_threshold

rules.label: Possible MD-VM overlap marker
rules.rule: posterior(dx_meniere_disease OR dx_early_probable_meniere_spectrum) >= moderate_posterior AND posterior(dx_vestibular_migraine) >= moderate_posterior
